name: Alector, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Bu siness. Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing therapies for neurodegenerative diseases, with a focus on areas of high unmet medical need. Our work is informed by advances in disease biology, including the roles of misfolded or deficient proteins, lysosomal dysfunction, and immune and neuronal pathway disruption.
